name: xau_m5_bb_rsi_mean_reversion
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when price closes outside a 20-period Bollinger Band with RSI(7) at an extreme, price reverts to the middle band within ~2.5 hours, provided volatility regime is active (BB width above 30th percentile) and session is London/NY.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb(20, 1.75) AND rsi(7) < 15 AND bb_width > bb_width_pctile_30 AND session in [london, ny] AND bars_since_last_trade >= 3
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb(20, 1.75) AND rsi(7) > 85 AND bb_width > bb_width_pctile_30 AND session in [london, ny] AND bars_since_last_trade >= 3

exit_rules.tp: opposite bollinger band (middle BB as early exit option)

regime_filter.rule: atr_percentile(14, lookback=500) between 20 and 85; reject extreme-low vol (dead) and extreme-high vol (trend) regimes
